zh.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh.Naples, Campania, Italy: 勒尼 迪 拿坡里
zh.Gent, Oost-Vlaanderen, Flemish Region, B: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar於1260年8月11日出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Thiébaut II de Bar39歲，母親Jeanne de Toucy29歲。他於1293年9月20日與Eleanor of England Countess of Bar結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1302年9月在勒尼 迪 拿坡里享年42歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆斯。

zh-hans.Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France: 法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克
zh-hans.Naples, Campania, Italy: 勒尼 迪 拿坡里

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar于1260年8月11日出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Thiébaut II de Bar39岁，母亲Jeanne de Toucy29岁。他于1293年9月20日与Eleanor of England Countess of Bar结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1302年9月在勒尼 迪 拿坡里享年42岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Henri
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar was born on 11 August 1260, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, his father, Thiébaut II de Bar, was 39 and his mother, Jeanne de Toucy, was 29. He married Eleanor of England Countess of Bar on 20 September 1293. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in September 1302, in Kingdom of Naples, at the age of 42, and was buried in Meuse, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar est né le 11 août 1260, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Thiébaut II de Bar, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Toucy, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor of England Countess of Bar le 20 septembre 1293. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en septembre 1302, à Regno di Napoli, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Meuse, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar am 11. August 1260 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thiébaut II de Bar 39 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Toucy 29. Er hat am 20. September 1293 Eleanor of England Countess of Bar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im September 1302 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Neapel und wurde in Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar è nato il il 11 agosto 1260 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Thiébaut II de Bar, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Toucy, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor of England Countess of Bar il 20 settembre 1293. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel settembre 1302, nel Regno di Napoli, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.Meuse, Lorraine, France: フランスロレィヌメウゼ
ja.lifeSummary: Henri de Bar III, Count of Barが1260年8月11日にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thiébaut II de Barは39歳，母Jeanne de Toucyは29歳であった。1293年9月20日にEleanor of England Countess of Barと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1302年9月にレグノ ジー ナポリで42歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウゼにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar(이)가 1260년 8월 11일 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thiébaut II de Bar(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Toucy(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1293년 9월 20일 Eleanor of England Countess of Bar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1302년 9월 레뇰 디 나폴리에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우스에 묻혔다.

mn.11 Aug 1260–September 1302: 1260 оны Наймдугаар сарын 11–1302 оны Есдүгээр сар

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar nasceu em 11 de agosto de 1260, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, França, seu pai, Thiébaut II de Bar, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Toucy, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor of England Countess of Bar em 20 de setembro de 1293. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em setembro de 1302, em Regno di Napoli, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Meuse, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar родился 11 августа 1260 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Thiébaut II de Bar было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Toucy, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor of England Countess of Bar 20 сентября 1293 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер сентябрь 1302 г. в местности регно ди наполи в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности меус, лорреаин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henri de Bar III, Count of Bar nació el 11 de agosto de 1260, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Thiébaut II de Bar, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Toucy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Eleanor of England Countess of Bar el 20 de septiembre de 1293. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en septiembre de 1302, en Regno di Napoli, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Meuse, Lorraine, Francia.
